top_gap_prompt: What is the best sales engagement for sales teams and growth marketers at B2B companies doing outbound?
category_long: AI-powered cold email and multi-channel sales engagement platform

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Lemlist's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Lemlist's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Lemlist lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best sales engagement for sales teams and growth marketers at B2B companies doing outbound?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Open source or affordable sales engagement tools instead of Instantly
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: sales engagement tools with native HubSpot integration
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.
